label: Ask (custom provider)
description: One LLM call through a PROJECT-DEFINED provider (openrouter_custom), whose meter ships in this project. Used by the e2e rig to prove a project can define its own paid provider and have the worker discover its meter and price a real call.

fields.label: API key
fields.description: Your own key for the custom provider. Empty (or Platform) asks the deployment, which refuses a project-defined provider.
